fieldguide.entity.companions.illager_gol: A golem built by the illagers. They appear during raids, and must be broken down and repaired to be used by players.
fieldguide.entity.companions.dinamo.desc: Peppy golems with a manageable shock packed in for your foes, Dinamo are more than simple power generators. They must be repaired to be used by players.
fieldguide.entity.companions.hostile_pup: Deep in a witches house, you may find a glove beckoning you to play Rock, Paper, Scissors. Play by the rules, and you can claim its mischief for yourself!
fieldguide.entity.companions.puppet_glov: A temporary companion obtained from a witches' game. It can strike, but not much else without a body to puppeteer.
fieldguide.entity.companions.puppet.desc: Puppets are great and all, but to unlock their true potential, you must give them... arms? Really? that's the missing piece that makes it all come together? Alrighty.
fieldguide.entity.companions.teddy.descr: Found in a prison ill-fitting of it's adorableness, Teddy is a plush toy with souls deeply woven into it's fabric. It appies Voodoo to enemies, and if lit with an Eternal Lighter, will reveal its hidden potential.
fieldguide.entity.companions.croissant_d: The progeny of the delicious-looking croissant egg, this dragon craves milk and being covered in pastry cream. It slows down hostile mobs with it's sheer delectableness, and it's various creams can provide beneficial effects!
fieldguide.entity.companions.broken_dina: The scraps of a Dinamo, to be repaired with love and care. Can be found by defeating illager golems or in factories.
fieldguide.entity.companions.living_cand: The Sacred Pontiff itself, his holiness is a divine font of power. If you threaten him enough, he will call upon his martial spirit. If you conquer him, you will receive Old Cloth and Relic Gold.
fieldguide.entity.companions.soul_mage.d: Born when a golden allay dons mage's garments, the Soul Mage is a scholar of magical tomes. It will cast spells it can get it's hands on, and can even utilize Living Candles to cheat death!
fieldguide.entity.companions.hostile_imp: Native to the Nether, hostile imps can be temped into a loyal minion with coins. Barter carefully though, they don't take kindly to bum deals!
fieldguide.entity.companions.minion.desc: A tamed, nondescript winged creature that takes a different form in different dimensions. Minion in the overworld, Imp in the Nether, Gargoyle in the End. They accept coins to trade for tomes, and if you don't care for the shifting, you can lock them with Netherite Chains.
fieldguide.entity.companions.wild_antlio: Wild antlions are found in the desert and bury in the sand to ambush their prey. To tame them, you must sneak up on them and offer them Crystalized Blood.
fieldguide.entity.companions.antlion.des: Antlions are rapidly metamorphosing creatures changing shape every day. It can be shorn, flown and even shoot sand at enemies. It's a versatile companion if you can get past it's rigid exoskeleton!
fieldguide.entity.companions.golden_alla: A rare sight, Golden Allays appear in swamps and show a propensity and spark for magic.
fieldguide.entity.companions.shade_sword: Summoned forth by using the Shade Sword Altar and a Shadow Bell. It encircles and slashed at enemies, before eventually being cast back from whence it came.
fieldguide.entity.companions.shade_maw.d: Summoned forth by using the Shade Maw Altar and a Shadow Bell. It has a toothy chomp, but primarily provides assistance through terrestrial and aquatic transport. Eventually, it will be cast back from whence it came.
fieldguide.entity.companions.cornelius.d: Cornelius is a ribbit with dreams of usurping casino empires. You can find him in swamps and tame him by slaying a bee in his sight. Give him Copper, Nether or End coins to allow him to gamble with the frog gods, summoning different creatures to assist you. He's also a solid 6/10 blackjack dealer.
fieldguide.entity.companions.cloak.descr: A tamed remnant of the Sacred Pontiff, the Cloak launch homing, explosive stars at enemies. It can also emenate an aura of invisibility to beguile threats.
fieldguide.entity.companions.mankh.descr: A small imitation of the Sacred Pontiff, the Mankh generates flaming rings to scorch nearby foes and can fire melting beams with it's white hot stare.
